page.title: Skill-Generated Example Dashboards
page.description: These files are example outputs generated from the repo-local skills under skills/. They are static, self-contained HTML examples for reviewing the skills' output shape.
page.bodyHtml:
These files are example outputs generated from the repo-local skills under skills/. They are static, self-contained HTML examples for reviewing the skills' output shape.

index.title: AgentSight: System-wide AI agent profiling and monitoring with eBPF

previous.title: OpenTelemetry GenAI Export
previous.description: AgentSight can export the LLM calls it captures as OpenTelemetry GenAI semantic-convention (genai.) spans, sent to any OpenTelemetry Collector over OTLP/HTTP.
